narrative:
Carroll Twp township has 1,583 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.8 percentage points.
